speaker: PAULINA
text: The keeper of the prison, call to him.

speaker: PAULINA
text: Let him have knowledge who I am.

speaker: PAULINA
text: Good lady,

speaker: PAULINA
text: No court in Europe is too good for thee.

speaker: PAULINA
text: What dost thou then in prison?

speaker: PAULINA
text: Now, good sir,

speaker: PAULINA
text: You know me, do you not?

speaker: JAILER
text: For a worthy lady

speaker: JAILER
text: And one who much I honor.

speaker: PAULINA
text: Pray you then,

speaker: PAULINA
text: Conduct me to the Queen.

speaker: JAILER
text: I may not, madam.

speaker: JAILER
text: To the contrary I have express commandment.

speaker: PAULINA
text: Here’s ado, to lock up honesty and honor from

speaker: PAULINA
text: Th’ access of gentle visitors. Is ’t lawful, pray you,

speaker: PAULINA
text: To see her women? Any of them? Emilia?

speaker: JAILER
text: So please you, madam,

speaker: JAILER
text: To put apart these your attendants, I

speaker: JAILER
text: Shall bring Emilia forth.

speaker: PAULINA
text: I pray now, call her.—

speaker: PAULINA
text: Withdraw yourselves.

speaker: JAILER
text: And, madam, I must be present at your conference.

speaker: PAULINA
text: Well, be ’t so, prithee.

speaker: PAULINA
text: Here’s such ado to make no stain a stain

speaker: PAULINA
text: As passes coloring.

speaker: PAULINA
text: Dear gentlewoman,

speaker: PAULINA
text: How fares our gracious lady?

speaker: EMILIA
text: As well as one so great and so forlorn

speaker: EMILIA
text: May hold together. On her frights and griefs,

speaker: EMILIA
text: Which never tender lady hath borne greater,

speaker: EMILIA
text: She is something before her time delivered.

speaker: PAULINA
text: A boy?

speaker: EMILIA
text: A daughter, and a goodly babe,

speaker: EMILIA
text: Lusty and like to live. The Queen receives

speaker: EMILIA
text: Much comfort in ’t, says “My poor prisoner,

speaker: EMILIA
text: I am innocent as you.”

speaker: PAULINA
text: I dare be sworn.

speaker: PAULINA
text: These dangerous unsafe lunes i’ th’ King, beshrew them!

speaker: PAULINA
text: He must be told on ’t, and he shall. The office

speaker: PAULINA
text: Becomes a woman best. I’ll take ’t upon me.

speaker: PAULINA
text: If I prove honey-mouthed, let my tongue blister

speaker: PAULINA
text: And never to my red-looked anger be

speaker: PAULINA
text: The trumpet anymore. Pray you, Emilia,

speaker: PAULINA
text: Commend my best obedience to the Queen.

speaker: PAULINA
text: If she dares trust me with her little babe,

speaker: PAULINA
text: I’ll show ’t the King and undertake to be

speaker: PAULINA
text: Her advocate to th’ loud’st We do not know

speaker: PAULINA
text: How he may soften at the sight o’ th’ child.

speaker: PAULINA
text: The silence often of pure innocence

speaker: PAULINA
text: Persuades when speaking fails.

speaker: EMILIA
text: Most worthy madam,

speaker: EMILIA
text: Your honor and your goodness is so evident

speaker: EMILIA
text: That your free undertaking cannot miss

speaker: EMILIA
text: A thriving issue. There is no lady living

speaker: EMILIA
text: So meet for this great errand. Please your Ladyship

speaker: EMILIA
text: To visit the next room, I’ll presently

speaker: EMILIA
text: Acquaint the Queen of your most noble offer,

speaker: EMILIA
text: Who but today hammered of this design,

speaker: EMILIA
text: But durst not tempt a minister of honor

speaker: EMILIA
text: Lest she should be denied.

speaker: PAULINA
text: Tell her, Emilia,

speaker: PAULINA
text: I’ll use that tongue I have. If wit flow from ’t

speaker: PAULINA
text: As boldness from my bosom, let ’t not be doubted

speaker: PAULINA
text: I shall do good.

speaker: EMILIA
text: Now be you blest for it!

speaker: EMILIA
text: I’ll to the Queen. Please you come something nearer.

speaker: JAILER
text: Madam, if ’t please the Queen to send the babe,

speaker: JAILER
text: I know not what I shall incur to pass it,

speaker: JAILER
text: Having no warrant.

speaker: PAULINA
text: You need not fear it, sir.

speaker: PAULINA
text: This child was prisoner to the womb, and is

speaker: PAULINA
text: By law and process of great nature thence

speaker: PAULINA
text: Freed and enfranchised, not a party to

speaker: PAULINA
text: The anger of the King, nor guilty of,

speaker: PAULINA
text: If any be, the trespass of the Queen.

speaker: JAILER
text: I do believe it.

speaker: PAULINA
text: Do not you fear. Upon mine honor, I

speaker: PAULINA
text: Will stand betwixt you and danger.
